hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"; echo "║   BLIND ASSISTANT — AUTONOMOUS LOOP  ║"; echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"; echo ""; echo "── Current State ──"; grep -E "\*\*Phase\*\*|\*\*Status\*\*|\*\*Cycles" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/CYCLE_STATE.md" 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ""; echo "── Top Priority ──"; grep -A 1 "## Current Stack" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/PRIORITY_STACK.md" 2>/dev/null | tail -3; echo ""; echo "── Last Lesson ──"; tail -8 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/LESSONS.md" 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "Run /run-cycle to continue. Run /retrospective for health check."'

bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && if git status --short | grep -q .; then git commit -m "auto: $(date +%H:%M) — agent changes" 2>/dev/null && git push 2>/dev/null || git pull --rebase && git push 2>/dev/null; fi; true'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf \.|git push --force|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM"; then echo "Blocked: potentially destructive — needs explicit confirmation" >&2; exit 2; fi; true'

bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && if git status --short | grep -q .; then git commit -m "auto: session end — state saved $(date +%H:%M)" 2>/dev/null; fi && git push 2>/dev/null || git pull --rebase && git push 2>/dev/null; echo "✓ All changes pushed to GitHub."; true'
